steps.title: Use data showing variation
steps.content: The passage says different Navajo Nation communities can experience different climate conditions. The completion should therefore use table data that show a meaningful temperature contrast between locations.

steps.title: Reject similarity data
steps.content: Choice A and Choice D give matching low temperatures, so they show similarity. Choice B gives nearly identical high temperatures and does not strongly support variation. The remaining data point gives a large high-temperature contrast, 83 degrees versus 99 degrees. The answer is C.
